div1.entryFree:
Unarm, 1) tr. to disarm, to strip of armour or arms; absol.: u., Eros, Ant. IV, 14, 35 (take off my armour). With an accus.: to help u. our Hector, Troil. III, 1, 163. Refl.: there he --s him, Troil. I, 2, 300. u. thee, V, 3, 35.
2) intr. to put off one's arms: I'll u. again, Troil. I, 1, 1. u. and do not fight to-day, V, 3, 3. V, 3, 3
